name: Rose Papillon
desc: During your Main Phase, you can Tribute Summon 1 Level 7 or higher monster in Attack Position in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) While you control another Insect monster, this card can attack directly.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase, you can Tribute Summon 1 Level 7 or higher monster in Attack Position in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) While you control another Insect monster, this card can attack directly.
eff: During your Main Phase, you can Tribute Summon 1 Level 7 or higher monster in Attack Position in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) While you control another Insect monster, this card can attack directly.

misc: Gain this effect once per turn
